name: agentic-acss-plugins
description: Claude Code plugin for building accessible React components and CSS themes for fpkit/acss projects

plugins.name: acss-kit
plugins.description: Generate accessible React components and CSS themes for fpkit/acss projects. Run /setup to bootstrap a new project (sass check, ui.tsx copy, starter theme). Then use /kit-add for components and /theme-create for themes. No @fpkit/acss npm package required.
